---
title: "My website"
author: "Claudia"
format:
  html:
   toc: true
   toc-location: right
   number-sections: true
   grid:
    sidebar-width: 300px # lato sinistro
    body-width: 900px # corpo del testo
    margin-width: 300px # lato destro
    gutter-width: 1.5rem
   theme:
    light: ninty # mi permette di fare switch tra light e dark
    dark: superhero
self_contained: true # utile per quando invii html a qualcuno, così non deve scaricare le immagini
lang: it # per settare la lingua del documento
bibliography: biblio.bib # per la bibliografia
reference-location: margin # per mettere le referenze in margine
citation-location: margin # per mettere le citazioni in margine
---

# Presentation 

Hello, I am Claudia and this is my website.

In @fig-cat you can find my cat

![This is my cat](images/cat.jpg){#fig-cat}

My link is [here](https://https://portale.units.it/it)

## Sub presentation

sub section 

### Sub sub presentation

sub sub section $X = Y + QA$

$$z = \dfrac{\bar{x} -\mu}{\sigma}$$

My @eq-ctt is an equation that I want to show in the margin

::: {.column-margin}
$$V = V + E$${#eq-ctt}
:::


#### Sub sub sub presentation

[@ggplot]
[@rsoft]

per creare le grid mi devo ricordare di chiudere sempre l'environment con i :::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
this is my first column
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
this is my second column
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
this is my third column

for further details look at the [code chunks](Code chunks.html)file.
:::
